case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. VS NIDUAZA GARY M.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $576.00 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NIDUAZA GARY M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
